linkedin_company.about: Advanced Chemical Industries (ACI) is a leading industrial manufacturer of Adhesives, Sealants and Lubricants. Established in 1986, ACI was formed in 1998 as a shareholder company (S.A.E), headquartered in Alexandria-Egypt. We provide a substantial range of products across a diverse range of markets, with a track record spanning over 25 years.
